title: Finn (Sith)
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Finn}} {{Character |type=Sith |image=[[File:DarthFinn.jpg]] |name=Finn |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{Tales|17|The Apprentice (comic story)}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Blond |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Red]] {{C|[[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]}} |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] |masters= |apprentices=*[[Finn's Sith apprentice|Unidentified male]] {{C|[[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]]}} *[[Marka]] {{C|Sith apprentice}} }} {{Quote|Take me with you. I want to learn. I can learn.''"
"''I have no use for a slave. And I already have an apprentice.|Marka and Finn|}} '''Finn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Master]] who operated as a [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Sith Wars]]. During his tenure as [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], he [[Sith training|trained]] a [[Finn's Sith apprentice|young man]] as his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]]. Finn and his pupil traveled to a [[Unidentified planet (Finn)|planet]] and planted a [[Bomb/Legends|bomb]] in a building. After concluding business with an [[Unidentified individual (Finn)|individual]], they destroyed the building and proceeded to the landing pad where Finn's [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was located. When Finn's apprentice [[Death/Legends|killed]] the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] owner [[Lod]] in order to free the female [[Marka]], Finn rebuked the young man. The pupil informed Finn that Marka was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], but the Sith Master—who was already aware of this—ordered his pupil to deal with her. As he boarded his ship, the apprentice and Marka arrived at the [[Hangar/Legends|landing bay]], and she begged Finn to take her so that she could learn the Sith ways. Finn replied that he already had an apprentice, and Marka killed the young man in order to take his role as Finn's pupil. Finn accepted her, demanding absolute loyalty from the young woman. ==Biography== {{Quote|She's still following us, Master.''"
"''I know. Perhaps she is why we came to this dreadful place. There is no such thing as coincidence.''"
"''I must deal with her.''"
"''Yes. Deal with her.|The male Sith apprentice and Finn, regarding Marka|}} [[File:Finn_hits_apprentice.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Finn rebukes his Sith apprentice.]] Finn, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was a [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Master]] who operated as a [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Sith Wars]].{{CSWECite|I|273|Finn (3)}} He took a [[Finn's Sith apprentice|young man]] as his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]], [[Sith training|training]] him in the ways of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]. Finn and his apprentice eventually traveled to a [[Unidentified planet (Finn)|world]] and planted a [[Bomb/Legends|bomb]] in a building. After concluding business with an [[Unidentified individual (Finn)|individual]], Finn and his pupil departed and detonated the bomb, which destroyed the building. As Finn and his apprentice made their way to their [[Starship/Legends|starship]], they encountered the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] master [[Lod]] and his slave, a young woman named [[Marka]]. When Lod ordered the woman to impress Finn and his apprentice, she refused, and he struck her. Finn's apprentice helped her from the ground and told Lod that he would not strike Marka again. When Lod called the apprentice a slave while talking to Finn, the man [[Death/Legends|killed]] the Toydarian. Finn expressed his disappointment to the apprentice; he rebuked him for helping Marka and punched him, knocking the young man to the ground. Finn then continued to the ship. After Marka helped the apprentice off the ground, he rushed to Finn and tried to tell the Sith Master that Marka had used a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] on him. Finn—having already recognized that Marka was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|sensitive]] to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]—reasoned that perhaps she was why they had come to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], and ordered his pupil to deal with her. As Finn reached the landing pad where his ship was docked, the apprentice and Marka caught up to him via the same [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]]. Marka pleaded with Finn, reasoning that she could learn the Sith ways. He refused, stating that he had no use for a slave and that he already had an apprentice. In response, Marka seized the apprentice's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and shoved him off the building's docking pad, where he fell to his death. Finn then took Marka as his new apprentice. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Empathy is a Jedi trait. Empathy leads to understanding. Understanding leads to compassion. Compassion leads to love. There is no place for love for a Sith. Only hate.|Finn rebukes his male Sith apprentice|}} [[File:MarkaFinn-Tales17.jpg|thumb|right|175px|Marka killed Finn's Sith apprentice and took his place.]] Finn would rebuke his male Sith apprentice for displaying traits characteristic of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], such as empathy. He also physically disciplined his apprentice when he felt that the man did something that was contrary to the Sith ways. During his [[Time/Legends|time]] on the planet where he encountered Marka, Finn felt that the world was a god-forsaken rock. When he realized that Marka was Force-sensitive, he mused that she was the only reason that he and his apprentice came to the planet. After Marka became Finn's Sith apprentice, the Sith Master demanded absolute loyalty from her. Finn wore a set of [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Sith apparel|Sith robes]], and had two [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoos]] under each [[Eye/Legends|eye]]. He had a scar on the left side of his face. ==Powers and abilities== {{Quote|Master…that girl…she…uh…I mean…''"
"''She tried a Force mind trick on you? Did you not sense it when they approached? The Force is powerful with her.|The male Sith apprentice and Finn|}} Finn was strong enough to reach the rank of Sith Master. He was able to [[Force sense/Legends|sense]] that Marka was strong with the Force when she and her slave master Lod approached him and his apprentice. ==Behind the scenes== Finn first appeared in the short [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] "[[The Apprentice (comic story)|The Apprentice]]," which featured in [[Star Wars Tales 17|''Star Wars Tales'' 17]] and was written by [[Mike Denning]]. In the comic, he was drawn by [[David Nakayama]]. The story was later compiled into a trade paperback version and republished in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 5]]''. Plausible stories in [[Star Wars Tales 1|''Star Wars Tales'' 1]]–''[[Star Wars Tales 20|20]]'' were initially viewed as [[Canon|S-canon]], unless and until referenced in a non-''Tales'' source, at which point the subject matter was elevated to C-canon status.{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=752#14952461|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-06-04|time=3:05 AM}} Finn later received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', which elevated the character's appearance in ''The Apprentice'' to C-canon. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Finn (Sith)}} *{{Tales|17|The Apprentice (comic story)}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Finn (Sith) |pl=Finn (Sith) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Finn (Sith)}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Sith Masters]] [[Category:Sith of the New Sith Wars]] [[Category:Terrorists]]
